title: Miner's Dream
description: Welcome to the Miner's Dream, an infinite cave with a lot to see and a lot to discover. Will you fight the Crystaline Empress or will you fight the Mechanith army of rogue AI. (This is my first mod so don't be too harsh)
body:
Welcome to the Miner's Dream, an infinite cave with a lot to see and a lot to discover. Will you fight the Crystaline Empress or will you fight the Mechanith army of rogue AI. (This is my first mod so don't be too harsh)
Content:




-Adds a new dimension: The Miner's Dream.

-This dimension contains five new biomes.

-(Almost) Every biome contains atleast one new dungeon.

-The deep caves biome contain the mechanith army of rogue AI.

-The crystall caves biome contain the crystalline kingdom.

-This mod adds new armor types: copper armor, supercharged copper armor, supercharged iron & netherite armor.

-It also adds new tools & items: supercharged iron & netherite tools, the multitool, two new music discs, a laser cannon & a supercharged variant, the empresses tiara, etc.

-Adds new colored amethyst variants: colored shards, colored blocks, colored lamps, colored stairs, colored slabs, colored bricks, colored brick stairs, colored walls, colored ladders, colored trapdoor, colored doors, etc.

-Adds new structures with loot to take and maybe stories to uncover.

-Adds new mobs.

-Adds new workbenches.

-Adds The Super Cocktail. (You can find what it does yourself because it's a suprise.)
